tasks.subject: Task 1: Migration numbering fix + schema migration + sqlc queries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Renumber 002→011 (IF NOT EXISTS), add 012 (avatar_source, picture_claim, confirmed_at + backfills), source-aware avatar meta queries + ConfirmAccountIdentity + picture_claim on upstream_idp CRUD; regenerate pkg/db.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/011_avatar.sql","db/migrations/012_federation_confirm_avatar.sql","db/queries/account.sql","db/queries/account_identity.sql","db/queries/upstream_idp.sql","pkg/db"],"verifyCommand":"podman compose up -d && mise db:up && mise exec -- sqlc generate && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags nodynamic ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["migrations 011/012 apply cleanly with backfills","sqlc generate + go build pass with new methods/columns"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Claim plumbing — picture hoist + Client.UserInfo
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hoist id_token picture into Tokens.Raw; add Client.UserInfo(ctx, accessToken) returning a claims map (picture hoisted) via the hardened RP client.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/client.go","pkg/federation/oidc/client_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ -run 'Picture|UserInfo' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Tokens.Raw['picture'] carries id_token picture","Client.UserInfo returns claims map with picture hoisted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SSRF-guarded avatar fetch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetchUpstreamAvatar — https-only, image/* only, 5 MiB cap, reusing screenDialControl; parameterize hardenedHTTPClient(allowPrivate, maxBytes).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/avatar_fetch.go","pkg/federation/oidc/avatar_fetch_test.go","pkg/federation/oidc/httpclient.go","pkg/federation/oidc/client.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ -run AvatarFetch -v","acceptanceCriteria":["rejects non-https, non-image, oversized","shares dial-screen with federation client"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Background avatar-inherit job + KV status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Detached goroutine: SetNX-deduped status key, resolve picture (id_token→UserInfo), fetch→Process→store (source='upstream'), skip when avatar_source='user' or etag unchanged; AvatarFetchKey helper; avatarFetch seam.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go","pkg/federation/oidc/state.go","pkg/federation/oidc/federation_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ -run AvatarInherit -v","acceptanceCriteria":["stores upstream avatar for fresh account","no-op on source=user or unchanged etag","SetNX dedup; status key cleared always"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ResolveOutcome + invite auto-confirm + re-login confirmed
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve/applyAutoProvision/applyInviteOnly return ResolveOutcome{AccountID,IdentityID,IsNew,Confirmed}; auto-provision Confirmed=false; invite confirms in-tx; existing identity Confirmed from confirmed_at. Update HandleCallback + CallbackResult.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/modes.go","pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go","pkg/federation/oidc/modes_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/federation/oidc/ -run 'Resolve|Provision|Invite' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["ResolveOutcome confirmed semantics correct across new/existing/invite","invite calls ConfirmAccountIdentity in-tx"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Confirmation grant + callback branch + confirm HTTP endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ConfirmGrant/ConfirmKey + Create/Pop/Peek ConfirmGrant + AvatarPending on Federator; HandleCallback withholds session for Confirmed=false (grant+cookie→/welcome) + kicks off avatar job both branches; confirm GET/POST/decline; FederationConfirmView; routes.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/federation/oidc/state.go","pkg/federation/oidc/federation.go","pkg/server/handle_federation.go","pkg/server/handle_federation_confirm.go","pkg/server/handle_federation_confirm_test.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/contract/auth.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run FederationConfirm -v && go test ./pkg/federation/...","acceptanceCriteria":["unconfirmed → no session cookie, fed-state cookie, redirect /welcome","confirm GET returns identity+avatar status (401 on bad grant)","confirm POST issues session + sets confirmed_at; decline pops grant"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Avatar source on self-service + status endpoint + /me avatarPending
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PUT/DELETE /me/avatar set avatar_source='user'; GET /me/avatar/status (authed) {pending}; SessionView.AvatarPending in /me.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_avatar.go","pkg/server/handle_me.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/handle_avatar_test.go","pkg/server/handle_me_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'Avatar|Me' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["upload/remove set avatar_source='user'","/me/avatar/status + /me avatarPending reflect KV key"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Frontend — WelcomeView interstitial + route + i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /welcome standalone page: fetch confirm view, render identity+avatar, spinner+poll while avatarPending, gate Continue (settled or ~30s cap), confirm POST→redirect, decline→/login. Route + i18n.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/WelcomeView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/WelcomeView.test.ts","dashboard/src/router","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/WelcomeView.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["renders identity; Continue gated until avatar settles/cap","confirm POST navigates to redirect; decline → /login"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Frontend — dashboard avatar spinner (returning users)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** UserAvatar loading overlay; NavUser polls /me/avatar/status when me.avatarPending and auth.reload() on clear; auth store pollAvatarUntilSettled helper.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/UserAvatar.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.vue","dashboard/src/stores/auth.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/UserAvatar.test.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/NavUser.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/components/custom/UserAvatar.test.ts src/components/custom/NavUser.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["UserAvatar shows spinner when loading","NavUser polls + reloads when avatarPending clears"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Admin + CLI pictureClaim
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose per-IdP picture_claim (default 'picture') in contract, admin handler + form/detail, CLI upstream-idp (--picture-claim), dev-seed.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_upstream_idps.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_upstream_idps_test.go","cmd/prohibitorum/main.go","cmd/prohibitorum/dev_seed.go","dashboard/src/pages/admin","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run UpstreamIDP -v && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags nodynamic ./... && cd dashboard && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["create/update accept pictureClaim (default picture)","admin form + CLI flag present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Smoke coverage + done-gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Smoke: federated auto-provision → /welcome (no session cookie) → confirm GET identity → poll avatarPending → confirm POST → session + GET /avatar/{sub} 200 webp + picture claim; no-clobber case. Full gate + rebuild/commit dist.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/smoke/main.go","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... && cd dashboard && npm run test && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["smoke federated confirm→avatar round-trip + no-clobber, SMOKE_EXIT=0","full gate green; dist rebuilt+committed"]}
```
